summary: Classified the 10 seeded PRs from the hydrated preflight artifact. This is an inventory shard with no shared canonical; close, fix, raise_pr, and merge paths are disabled, and no security-sensitive seed PRs were detected. Open PRs are kept open for their existing maintainer/review/proof lanes; the already-closed seed PR is recorded as closed context only.

actions.reason: Useful maintainer-owned draft PR with proof, but it needs maintainer review and merge gates outside this close/comment/label-only inventory shard.
Narrow plausible bug-fix PR; keep open because review completion and merge judgment are outside this job.
Already merged/closed seed PR; retained as historical context only.
Substantial feature PR with product/API taxonomy decisions and conflicts; keep open for maintainer review rather than close, merge, or autonomous replacement.
Open draft feature PR with missing proof and failing gates; keep open in its proof/review lane.
Open draft config/API feature PR with failed proof and checks; keep open rather than close or classify as duplicate.
Open draft Telegram behavior PR with failed proof; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Focused edit-tool UX PR with proof; keep open for normal review/merge decision outside this shard.
Maintainer-owned test cleanup with known proof/gate caveat; keep open for maintainer decision, not autonomous closeout.
Useful narrow fix but blocked by actionable bot/human review findings and failing checks; keep open for author changes.
